_note: Marion's knowledge manifest. Marion reads this FIRST, then loads every file listed under 'manufacturers' and merges their products into one catalog. To add a manufacturer: drop its file in /knowledge/manufacturers/ and add a line here. To temporarily disable one: set active=false. Bump 'knowledge_version' whenever you publish a change.
crossref_note: parent-profiles.json is the canonical join layer: every vendor/manufacturer profile (Fluidseal/SSG, Fluidseal Xpress, DMH, Parker, Hallite, Freudenberg, Maxspare) maps to a parent_profile, which resolves to the Fluidseal/SSG equivalent. crossref.json is the older category-bridge for Hallite/Clipper and is superseded by parent-profiles for any part with an explicit parent.

manufacturers.name: Fluidseal
manufacturers.note: Fluidseal's own normalized profile namespace — the translation layer other manufacturers map into. Each profile carries a verified sealsonline.com leaf URL.
